key_themes: Attractive valuation with high FCF yield and aggressive buybacks
Improving underwriting income and earnings resilience
Analyst Hold consensus with ~12% average upside despite recent PT trims
Imminent Q1 2026 earnings report on April 30
Strategic transformation, AI initiatives, and key partnerships
summary: Sentiment toward AIG is neutral with mild positive undertones ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings. The stock trades near $78.68 with a reasonable 14.5x PE, 2.3% dividend yield, strong share repurchases (27% retired in recent years per some analyses), and improved underwriting results from the prior quarter. Analysts largely rate it Hold with an average price target near $87–88 (offering 11–12% upside), though several firms have made minor downward PT adjustments recently while citing execution risks in insurance markets.
sources: 20+ news articles (Yahoo Finance, MarketBeat, Zacks, Reuters, company IR), ~10 relevant X posts (low engagement; mostly analyst updates and value commentary)
